_unverified: Best-effort tutorial content outline (task 8.6). Not built/validated in CI.

chapters.title: Welcome
steps: Import an OBJ (with vertex colors) as your read-only Target.
Understand the three stages: Retopology, UV, Baking.
Pencil draws; fingers navigate — the camera is a tool.

chapters.title: Retopology
steps: Pencil: sketch edge loops; the EditMesh snaps to the Target surface.
Relax: even out quad spacing along a stroke.
Tweak / Move: nudge vertices; Erase removes topology.
Undo up to 30 steps; autosave protects you on backgrounding.

chapters.title: UV
steps: Cut: draw seams to split the mesh into islands.

chapters.title: Baking
steps: Adjust the editable cage to control ray casting.
Bake tangent-space normals and color from the Target.
Export OBJ/STL/ZIP or bridge over the local network.
